infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: OpenVoice needs the microphone to listen to your speech for language learning.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OpenVoice uses the camera to identify objects and teach you their English names.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: OpenVoice transcribes your speech to help you learn English.
